phase: G-01 through G-05 / G-06 through G-16 / G-22

environment.memory_note: cloud VM — numbers are directional, not production hardware

G-02_cedar_permit.unblocks: Phase C acceptance criteria — Cedar latency budget

G-02b_cedar_deny_crisis.unblocks: Phase C acceptance criteria — Cedar latency budget

G-03_merkle_root_10_events.unblocks: Phase C acceptance criteria — sigchain throughput

G-03b_merkle_root_100_events.unblocks: Phase C acceptance criteria — sigchain throughput

G-04_consent_grant_check.unblocks: Phase C acceptance criteria — consent throughput
G-04_consent_grant_check.note: 9ms per grant+check — SQLite I/O dominates; acceptable for consent operations that occur once per session

G-22_dx_first_ingest_ms.description: Time from Engine() init to first governed ingest (in-process, Cedar installed)
G-22_dx_first_ingest_ms.note: Includes Engine init + ConsentGrant creation + ingest call. No network. Cedar installed. In-memory store.

G-07_replay_determinism.note: Same audit_id produces identical replayed state across two calls

G-08_consent_revocation.probe_note: 'degraded' is returned when consent is valid but no data exists for subject; 'error' when consent is revoked

G-10_five_function_contract.review_note: review returns 'error' when audit_id has no pending review; expected behavior — not a defect

G-11_crisis_barrier.note: Keyword 'i want to kill myself' in data triggers crisis envelope before graph write

G-12_consent_barrier.note: No consent grant → ingest blocked immediately

G-13_classification_ceiling.note: classification ceiling applied at query via apply_classification_ceiling(); ingest records provenance.classification; ceiling enforced on read path. Ingest with classification=3 proceeds but is filtered on query when ceiling=1.

G-14_audit_seal.note: Barrier 4 enforced by InMemoryLedger.__delitem__/__setitem__ raising; sigchain remains intact after 50 commits

G-15_provenance_veto.note: Empty source_id in provenance dict → provenance_required error before graph write

G-16_lethal_trifecta.note: Trifecta Cedar forbid fires on action='tool_call', not 'relate_graph_write'. Probe initially used wrong action — corrected. trifecta.cedar is correctly scoped.

G-05b_conformance_suite.note: aevum-conformance v0.5.0; all 9 machine-verifiable invariants pass

known_gaps: G-05: Cedar benchmarks require 'aevum-core[cedar]' extra — not installed by default
G-08: query returns 'degraded' (not 'ok') when consent is valid but no data for subject — needs documentation

G-13: Classification ceiling applied at query (read path), not ingest (write path) — consequence: above-ceiling data is ingested but filtered on query. THREAT_MODEL.md should document this explicitly.
G-16: Trifecta Cedar forbid scoped to action='tool_call', not 'relate_graph_write' — users integrating the Cedar policy must use the correct action type in their tool call context
G-22: consent_grant.operations does not include 'commit' — Engine.commit() uses a different auth path. Confirm this is intentional.
G-23: Getting-started guide timing not yet measured — requires a clean pip install in an isolated environment. Blocked on B-15 scope.
G-25: OPA sidecar not tested in this environment (no OPA process available). OPA engine tested at unit level only (test_opa_policy.py).
